title: Kenyan Lentil Stew
description: A hearty stew originating from Kenya, made with lentils and inspired by traditional Kenyan flavors.

ingredients.name: lentils
ingredients.notes: brown or green lentils work well

instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add lentils, broth, and tomato paste.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Place dumplings on top of the stew and cover with foil.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until dumplings are cooked through.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
